en: A SONG OF PRAISE. OF DAVID. I will extol you, my God and King, and bless your name forever and ever.
zh: 我的 神，我的王啊！我要尊崇你， 我要永永遠遠稱頌你的名。

en: Every day I will bless you and praise your name forever and ever.
zh: 我要天天稱頌你， 我要永永遠遠讚美你的名。

en: Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised, and his greatness is unsearchable.
zh: 耶和華是至大的，配受極大的讚美， 他的偉大無法測度。

en: One generation shall commend your works to another, and shall declare your mighty acts.
zh: 世世代代的人都要頌讚你的作為， 他們要傳揚你大能的作為。

en: On the glorious splendor of your majesty, and on your wondrous works, I will meditate.
zh: 他們要講述你威嚴的尊榮， 我也要默想你奇妙的作為。

en: They shall speak of the might of your awesome deeds, and I will declare your greatness.
zh: 他們要述說你所行可畏的事的能力， 我也要宣揚你的偉大。

en: They shall pour forth the fame of your abundant goodness and shall sing aloud of your righteousness.
zh: 他們要傳述你可記念、至善的名， 也要歌唱你的公義。

en: The LORD is gracious and merciful, slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love.
zh: 耶和華有恩典有憐憫， 不輕易發怒，大有慈愛。

en: The LORD is good to all, and his mercy is over all that he has made.
zh: 耶和華善待萬有， 他的憐憫臨到他一切所造的。

en: All your works shall give thanks to you, O LORD, and all your saints shall bless you!
zh: 耶和華啊！你一切所造的都要稱謝你， 你的聖民也要稱頌你。

en: They shall speak of the glory of your kingdom and tell of your power,
zh: 他們要講論你國的榮耀， 也要述說你大能的作為。

en: to make known to the children of man your mighty deeds, and the glorious splendor of your kingdom.
zh: 好使世人知道你大能的作為， 和你國威嚴的尊榮。

en: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and your dominion endures throughout all generations. [The LORD is faithful in all his words and kind in all his works.]
zh: 你的國是永遠的國， 你的王權存到萬代 。

en: The LORD upholds all who are falling and raises up all who are bowed down.
zh: 跌倒的，耶和華都扶持他們； 被壓迫的，他都扶他們起來。

en: The eyes of all look to you, and you give them their food in due season.
zh: 萬人的眼睛都仰望你， 你按時把糧食賜給他們。

en: You open your hand; you satisfy the desire of every living thing.
zh: 你把手張開， 使所有生物都隨願得到飽足。

en: The LORD is righteous in all his ways and kind in all his works.
zh: 耶和華在他一切所行的事上，都是公義的， 他對他一切所造的，都存著慈愛的心。

en: The LORD is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
zh: 凡是求告耶和華的，耶和華都和他們接近， 就是和所有真誠求告他的人接近。

en: He fulfills the desire of those who fear him; he also hears their cry and saves them.
zh: 敬畏他的，他必成就他們的心願， 也必聽他們的呼求，拯救他們。

en: The LORD preserves all who love him, but all the wicked he will destroy.
zh: 耶和華保護所有愛他的人， 卻要消滅所有惡人。

en: My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD, and let all flesh bless his holy name forever and ever.
zh: 我的口要說讚美耶和華的話； 願所有的人都永永遠遠稱頌他的聖名。
